title: stachys rugosa
intro: Stachys rugosa, also known as Wrinkled Stachys or Wrinkled Betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stachys rugosa include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as reduction in stress and anxiety levels. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
